ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Mongitore, Benedetto Salvago was a member of the Umoristi Academy in Rome. For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 103 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
